raw.advertiser_name: 피망 쇼다운 홀덤 : 텍사스 홀덤, 포커, 토너먼트

hook.summary: Introduction to the Pmang Showdown Hold'em tournament with a futuristic city backdrop and live tournament footage.
hook.visual_action: Logo animation transitions into a wide shot of a massive live poker tournament hall.

scene_flow: Intro logo over a cyberpunk city skyline.
Wide shot of a crowded professional poker tournament venue.
Close-up shots of professional dealers and players at the tables.
Close-up of poker chips and a winning hand being revealed.
Final branding screen with app store download links.
audience_proxy: Competitive male poker enthusiasts in Korea looking for professional-grade tournament experiences.
